title: Admin username/password approval for feedback with approved feedback display on homepage

requirements.summary: Implement admin login form with username/password authentication and feedback approval management in AdminDashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /admin shows the AdminLoginForm when not authenticated.
Entering the correct username and password logs the admin in and shows the dashboard.
The feedback tab lists all pending feedback with Approve and Reject buttons.
Clicking Approve marks the feedback as approved in the backend; clicking Reject marks it as rejected.
Inline loading spinners are shown during approve/reject operations.
A success or error toast is displayed after each action.

file_operations.description: Update the AdminLoginForm to use username and password fields for authentication. The form currently calls useAdminLogin mutation; ensure it passes username and password as arguments to actor.adminLogin(username, password) and handles the boolean response. Display error messages for failed login attempts. Remove any Internet Identity-related logic if present and focus solely on credential-based authentication.

Add or update the useAdminLogin mutation hook to call actor.adminLogin(username, password) with the provided credentials. The backend returns a boolean indicating success. On successful login, store the authentication state (e.g., in localStorage or React state) to gate admin dashboard access. Add useApproveFeedback and useRejectFeedback mutation hooks that call actor.approveFeedback(id) and actor.updateFeedbackStatus(id, 'rejected') respectively, invalidating the 'allFeedback' query on success.

Update AdminDashboard to check admin authentication state on mount. If not authenticated, display the AdminLoginForm. Once authenticated, show the tabbed dashboard. In the feedback management tab, fetch all feedback using useGetAllFeedback and display each item with inline Approve and Reject buttons. Wire the Approve button to call the useApproveFeedback mutation and the Reject button to call the useRejectFeedback mutation. Show loading spinners on buttons during mutation execution. Display success or error toasts after each action completes. Ensure the feedback list updates immediately after approval/rejection via query invalidation.

requirements.summary: Display only approved feedback in ReviewsSection on the homepage alongside hardcoded seed reviews
acceptanceCriteria: The ReviewsSection on the homepage displays all approved feedback fetched from the backend.
Pending and rejected feedback items are not shown in the ReviewsSection.
Loading skeletons are displayed while feedback is being fetched.
Newly approved feedback appears in the ReviewsSection after page refresh or query invalidation.

file_operations.description: Add a useGetApprovedFeedback query hook that calls actor.getApprovedFeedback() to fetch only feedback items with status 'approved'. Configure the query with appropriate staleTime and caching to ensure fresh data appears after approval actions. Ensure this query is invalidated when feedback approval mutations succeed.

Update ReviewsSection to use the useGetApprovedFeedback hook instead of fetching all feedback. Combine the approved feedback items with the existing hardcoded seed reviews. Display loading skeletons while the query is loading. Ensure that only feedback with 'approved' status is rendered. Map each approved feedback item to a review card with name, rating, and review text. Verify that pending and rejected feedback items are excluded from the display.
